name: zvid_accepted_hardware_renderer_count_thunk
description: zVid::GetAcceptedHardwareRendererCountThunk is non-authored linker glue that tail-jumps to the cached accepted-renderer count getter.
known_limits: Binary Ninja shows 0x4a7470 as a direct tail jump to zVid::GetAcceptedHardwareRendererCount_Cached; there is no authored game function body to compare with VC COFF object bytes.
The real callee at 0x4a9910 has current VC5SP3 COFF byte-compare evidence with zero unmasked mismatches.
Final binary safety for this entry belongs to thunk/linker layout verification rather than per-function source codegen.
The native smoke verifies the accepted-renderer count observable through the verified cached-count accessor.
